description: Machine-readable index of all verified tools in this library. Agents: load this file first, find relevant tools by category/tags, then fetch only the specific script needed.

tools.description: List all MRML nodes in the current scene with index, class, and name
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment; optionally pass a save_path to write output to disk

tools.description: Download and load the MRHead sample volume from Slicer's built-in SampleData module
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment (headless or GUI)

tools.description: Enable volume rendering on a loaded scalar volume with a named preset (MR-Default, CT-Bone, etc.)
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment; requires a loaded volume node

tools.description: Capture and save the 3D view widget as a PNG screenshot
tools.usage: Run inside Slicer Python environment; pass output_path to set destination

tools.description: Shell launcher: run a Python script in Slicer with optional GUI or headless mode
tools.usage: ./run-slicer-script.sh <script.py> [--headless]; set SLICER_BIN at top of file
